description.en: You gain {{value}} eldritch invocations of your choice.

description_eval_variables.value: class_level = classes['warlock']; return 8 if class_level >= 18; return 7 if class_level >= 15; return 6 if class_level >= 12; return 5 if class_level >= 9; return 4 if class_level >= 7; return 3 if class_level >= 5; 2

description.en: Your otherworldly patron bestows a gift upon you for your loyal service.
You can use your action to create a pact weapon in your empty hand.
Learn 1 spell per specific level ({{value}}). You can use it once per day without spending spell slot.

description_eval_variables.value: class_level = classes['warlock']; return '6, 7, 8, 9' if class_level >= 17; return '6, 7, 8' if class_level >= 15; return '6, 7' if class_level >= 13; '6'
